---
title: "Report for molecular clock estimaten and model comparison between different clock models"
author: Friederike Wölke
date: 2026-06-24
format: html
embed-resources: true
standalone: true
toc: true
---

```{r}
library(here)
here()
```


# Workflow

```{r}
fp <- here("scripts/clock-model/")

fs::dir_tree(path = fp)
```


In RevBayes run the following scripts:
```{bash}
#| eval: false

# in RevBayes run scripts:
source(fp+"0_master_file-MCMC_dating.Rev") # m0 - Exponential distribution for global clock

```


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig.height: 10
#| fig.width: 8
library(ape)
library(phytools)
library(dplyr)
library(phangorn)

tre <-
  read.tree(
    here(
      "data/output/clock_model_plstm/plstm_global.trees"
    )
  )


tree_mcc <-
  read.tree(
    here(
      "data/output/clock_model_plstm/plstm_global.mcc.tre"
    )
  )
```

Phytools consensus tree:
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig.height: 10
#| fig.width: 8
ct <-
  phytools::ls.consensus(tre) %>%
  root.phylo(outgroup = "Spondianthus_preussii") %>%
  ladderize()
plot(ct)
axisPhylo()
```

Phangorn MCC tree
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig.height: 10
#| fig.width: 8
mcc <-
  phangorn::maxCladeCred(tre, rooted = FALSE) %>%
  root.phylo(outgroup = "Spondianthus_preussii") %>%
  ladderize()
plot(mcc)
axisPhylo()


write.tree(
  mcc,
  file = "data/output/clock_model_plstm/plstm_global.phangorn-mcc.tre"
)
```

RevBayes MCC tree

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig.height: 10
#| fig.width: 8
tree_mcc <- tree_mcc[[6]] %>%
  root.phylo(outgroup = "Spondianthus_preussii") %>%
  ladderize()

plot(tree_mcc)
axisPhylo()
```
